plugins.name: graphify-kit
plugins.description: Battle-tested graphify (knowledge graph) onboarding for any repo: exclusion analysis, agent navigation protocol, Explore override, session sync hooks, worktree seeding, and a graph-health doctor

plugins.name: spec
plugins.description: Vault-backed spec workflow: spec:plan is the single front door (brainstorm + grill + spec, with an optional lean plan doc and an execution-mode decision); spec:execute runs handed-off plans through pinned subagents. Self-contained; reads per-project settings from a JSON block in CLAUDE.local.md.
